title: Giftmaker Pack 100 Assorted Colours Paper Chains Christmas Decoration
features: HANDMADE CHRISTMAS DECORATIONS: Make your own handmade garlands and paper chains from metallic paper, then hang them up in the classroom, at home or on the Christmas tree for all to see
PERFECT FOR CHILDREN: Get them into the festive spirit by creating your own colourful chains and placing them around the house as decoration
EASY TO USE: Simply make a loop with a strip, take another and loop it through join it together using the sticky tabs provided
ENDLESS DECORATING POSSIBILITIES: Enjoy endless decorating possibilities with these versatile paper chains, they are perfect for decorating your Christmas tree, mantel, ceiling, or walls
PACK CONTAINS: With 100 paper pieces per pack in 4 assorted colours: Gold, silver, red and green. Each link measures approx. 22cm
description: Add a touch of elegance to your holiday decor with our pack of 100 paper chain decorations! Coming in classic gold, silver, red, and green colours, these festive chains are perfect for decorating your Christmas tree, mantel, ceiling, or walls. Made of high-quality paper with easy-to-use sticky tabs, you can create a custom length to fit any space. Enjoy endless decorating possibilities with these versatile paper chains and bring the magic of the holiday season into your home today!
